theorem.name: parameter_initialization_theorem
theorem.statement: There exists an initialization family aligned with family patches, transport scaffold, theorem monitor priors, and persistent external closure such that training begins inside a stable recoverable basin; evidence is now strong enough for strict constructive support, while fully unique closed-form theta* remains an open refinement.
theorem.main_risk: strict constructive support is strong, but full uniqueness and closed-form theta* synthesis remain stronger-than-current claims
